query: INSERT INTO immich_api_keys (user_id, base_url, ciphertext, nonce, immich_user_id, created_at, last_validated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON CONFLICT(user_id) DO UPDATE SET base_url = excluded.base_url, ciphertext = excluded.ciphertext, nonce = excluded.nonce, immich_user_id = excluded.immich_user_id, last_validated_at = excluded.last_validated_at
